name: COMPANY_NAME
description: Client's trading name. Appears in page title and hero section.

name: PHONE_DISPLAY
description: Phone number formatted for display (e.g. '(800) 000-0000').

name: PHONE_HREF
description: Phone number for tel: href. Digits only, no spaces (e.g. '8000000000').

name: ACCENT_COLOR
description: Brand hex color. Used as --primary and --accent CSS variables. Defaults to REI Transfer red.

name: LOGO_URL
description: Absolute URL to client logo image (Vercel Blob CDN URL).

name: HEADLINE
description: Hero section headline text.

name: SUBHEADLINE
description: Hero section subheadline text.

name: STAT_1_VALUE
description: First trust stat value (e.g. '1,000+').

name: STAT_1_LABEL
description: First trust stat label (e.g. 'Homes Purchased').

name: STAT_2_VALUE
description: Second trust stat value.

name: STAT_2_LABEL
description: Second trust stat label.

name: STAT_3_VALUE
description: Third trust stat value.

name: STAT_3_LABEL
description: Third trust stat label.

name: META_TITLE
description: SEO <title> tag content.

name: META_DESCRIPTION
description: SEO meta description content.

name: PRIVACY_POLICY_URL
description: URL for privacy policy page. Defaults to /privacy (built into template).

name: TERMS_URL
description: URL for terms of service page. Defaults to /terms (built into template).

name: WEBHOOK_URL
description: n8n lead handler webhook. Format: https://n8n.srv1197128.hstgr.cloud/webhook/lead-{slug}.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_PLACES_API_KEY
description: Google Places API key for address autocomplete. Shared across all clients (restrict via GCP Console). In the deploy webapp, this reads from NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_FB_PIXEL_ID
description: Meta (Facebook) Pixel ID. Leave empty if client has no pixel yet; set post-deploy.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_VIDALYTICS_ACCOUNT_ID
description: Vidalytics account ID for video embed. Optional -- set post-deploy if client uses video.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_VIDALYTICS_EMBED_ID
description: Vidalytics embed ID. Optional -- set post-deploy if client uses video.

name: SERVICE_AREAS
description: JSON array of service area circles: [{id, centerLat, centerLng, radiusMiles}]. Passed to address autocomplete for location bias.

name: NEXT_PUBLIC_SERVICE_AREAS
description: Client-side copy of SERVICE_AREAS for address autocomplete location bias and validation. JSON array of circles: [{centerLat, centerLng, radiusMiles}].
